use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons on landing pages
Hero section action buttons with premium visual appeal
ai_summary: A premium button component featuring glossy, shiny borders with radial gradient effects and multiple glow layers. The button includes dynamic hover states that scale the inner content and intensify the glow effects, creating an elegant glass-morphism aesthetic suitable for dark-themed interfaces. Designed as an atomic component for versatile use across landing pages, hero sections, and call-to-action areas in modern web applications.
